title: rubus koehleri var. brevithyrsus
intro: Rubus koehleri var. brevithyrsus is a variant of the Rubus koehleri plant, commonly known as a type of blackberry or bramble. It is a type of flowering shrub native to China, known for its medicinal properties which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Rubus koehleri var. brevithyrsus include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of Rubus koehleri var. brevithyrsus include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
